overview: Thrill World is a dark cinematic amusement park marketing website. It features 8 immersive sections: a particle-filled hero with a rotating Ferris wheel, an attractions showcase carousel, an interactive SVG park map, scroll-triggered stats counters, 3D-tilt pricing cards, a guest stories grid, a visit planner, and an animated footer. Built with React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS.
features: Animated hero with canvas particle field and rotating Ferris wheel
Horizontal attractions carousel with thrill meter and category filters
Interactive SVG park map with clickable zones and info popups
Scroll-triggered animated stats counters (45+ rides, 3M+ visitors, etc.)
3D-tilt pricing cards with countdown timer and sticky CTA bar
Masonry guest reviews grid with auto-scrolling testimonial marquee
Plan your visit section with hours, FAQ accordion, and date picker
Animated skyline footer with newsletter signup and social links
Sticky navigation that transitions from transparent to solid on scroll
